'''Mantan''' was a terrestrial<ref name="TEA" /> [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="GaTORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> located in the [[Mantan system/Legends|Mantan system]], a part of the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Prously's Rim Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked it to the [[New Heurkea system/Legends|New Heurkea]] and [[Pammant system/Legends|Pammant systems]]. Members of the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] Mantan at some point between [[4400 BBY]] and [[4200 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> and the former world shared its name with the Mon Calamari [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Mantan Wanderer]]'' of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|286|''Mantan Wanderer''}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Mantan was first mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''.<ref name="GaTORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed it in grid square U-6.<ref name="TEA" />
